title: sv.messaging.broadcast.input
description: Input for sv.messaging.broadcast — a one-way message-delivery tool (ADR-0049). It durably delivers one message to multiple targets in parallel; it does NOT wait for or return the recipients' replies. Supply exactly one of 'scope' or 'addresses'. The platform delivers messages, it does not orchestrate.

scope.description: Resolve the recipient set from the caller's position in the member graph: 'unit-members' delivers to the members of the calling unit; 'siblings' delivers to the caller's siblings. Mutually exclusive with 'addresses'.

addresses.description: Explicit recipient set. Mutually exclusive with 'scope'.

items.description: Canonical scheme:no-dash-hex address of a target in the caller's tenant.

message.description: The message payload to deliver to each target. Opaque to the platform; a JSON string or object.

reason.description: Optional rationale recorded verbatim on the MessageSent activity.
